hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Describing a typical day at work -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 -- My Daily Routine -- A Typical Day at Work
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 2 -- My Daily Routine

listenings.text: Hi everyone, let me tell you about a typical workday on our team. Our workday always starts at nine o'clock. First, we have a short stand-up meeting at nine fifteen. In this meeting, we talk about our tasks for the day. After the stand-up, we usually check our email and start our work. We often take a lunch break at twelve thirty. In the afternoon, we sometimes have one more meeting. And we never forget our reports: every report is due on Friday, before five o'clock. That is our normal day. It is busy, but we really like our routine!
